mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fire_compliance WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_fire_compliance WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_compliance WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_compliance (title, law_basis, rate, items, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{title}, #{lawBasis}, #{rate}0, #{items}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_compliance SET title = #{title}, law_basis = #{lawBasis}, rate = #{rate}, items = #{items}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_fire_compliance SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
